title: CLMP Certification — Loyalty Marketing Professional
tagline: The original CLMP curriculum, taught by practitioners. Five days, one cohort, one of the only certifications that boards recognise.
description: The Certified Loyalty Marketing Professional (CLMP) credential is the global standard for loyalty operators. Across five intensive days, the QBF cohort covers strategy, economics, technology, behavioural design, and program management — taught by consultants who have run programs at scale, not just advised on them.
agenda: Day 1 — Strategy, business case, and member economics
Day 2 — Behavioural design and earn/burn architecture
Day 3 — Technology selection, integrations, and data
Day 4 — Program management, ops, and analytics

title: CLMP Certification — Dubai Cohort
tagline: The full CLMP curriculum, run from our Dubai practice. Optimised for GCC operators with a regional capstone.
description: The Dubai cohort runs the full CLMP curriculum with a GCC-specific capstone. Members work on a real loyalty case from the region across the week and present to a panel on the final day.

title: Loyalty Tech Evaluation — One-Day Workshop
tagline: A working session for teams scoping their next loyalty platform. Walk in with a vendor list, walk out with a defensible shortlist.
description: An intensive working session for product, marketing, and tech leads who are about to make a multi-year platform decision. We work through QBF's evaluation framework against your real requirements, score four to six vendors, and leave you with a board-ready recommendation.

title: Loyalty Economics Masterclass
tagline: Half-day deep dive on the unit economics of loyalty programs. For finance, strategy, and CRM leads who need to defend the P&L line.
description: A half-day masterclass on member-level economics, breakage, redemption health, and incrementality. Designed for finance partners, strategy leads, and CRM directors who need to explain — and defend — the program's contribution to margin.

title: The Future of Retail Loyalty
tagline: A 90-minute panel on where retail loyalty is heading next, with operators from three major retailers.
description: A free 90-minute panel discussion on the next decade of retail loyalty. Three program owners join QBF to debate paid memberships, identity, and the role of agentic AI in member experience.
agenda: Trend debate — paid, identity, agentic AI

title: Loyalty CMO Roundtable — London
tagline: Invite-only roundtable for senior loyalty owners. Chatham House rules, twelve seats, one shared agenda.
description: An invite-only, twelve-seat roundtable for senior loyalty owners across retail, hospitality, aviation, and financial services. Chatham House rules, one shared agenda, and a written synthesis circulated to attendees only.
